name: Pumpkin Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
2. Beat the eggs and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the oil and cooked, mashed pumpkin to the egg mixture, stirring continuously.
4. Blend in the sifted dry ingredients until just combined.
5. Fold in the chopped pecans and chocolate chips.
6. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 60 minutes.
9. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a cooling rack.
